approach: TensorAccessor for RM sticks, 1 pass per tile-row, prepare_reduce_scaler for c_2 and c_3
tilize c_0->c_1, untilize c_1->c_17 identity passthrough with InitAndUninit and UnpackAndPackReconfigure
Wait for Wt pages in c_17, extract 32 RM sticks per tile-row, TensorAccessor noc_async_write to DRAM

change: Removed num_tile_rows from compute compile-time args, will add as runtime arg
reason: num_tile_rows varies per core (cliff core) so cannot be compile-time

change: Added compute_rt_args with per-core num_tile_rows, updated compute kernel descriptor to use them, removed num_tile_rows from compile-time args
reason: num_tile_rows varies per core due to cliff core, must be runtime arg

approach: Changed num_tile_rows from compile-time arg to runtime arg (index 0), shifted has_gamma/has_beta compile-time indices

details: template argument ambiguity: tilize_config and untilize_config both have InitUninitMode/WaitMode/ReconfigureRegisterDatatypeMode enums, using namespace for both causes collision

description: using namespace for both tilize_config and untilize_config causes enum name collisions. Fix: use fully qualified names for all template args
evidence: compiler error: template argument 3 is invalid on tilize call

change: Removed ambiguous using namespace declarations, switched to fully qualified tilize_config:: and untilize_config:: prefixes for all template args

upstream_fixes: moved num_tile_rows from compile-time to runtime arg for compute kernel

description: Add reduce_row phase after tilize to compute row-wise mean. Output is reduced shape with only Col0 valid.

approach: Added reduce<SUM,REDUCE_ROW> after tilize, untilize c_24->c_17 with block_width=1 for reduced output

change: Changed output_shape to list(shape[:-1]) + [32] for reduced output
reason: Stage 2 produces reduced-shape output (1 tile wide), test expects tile-aligned W=32

change: Writer CT args now use output_stick_size and output_Wt derived from output tensor shape instead of input
reason: Reduced-shape stage has output W=32 vs input W, writer must use output dimensions

details: TypeError: ttnn.Shape does not support slice indexing with [:-1]. Need to convert to list first.

description: ttnn.Shape does not support Python slice indexing. Fix: convert shape to list before slicing.

change: Convert shape to list before slicing to avoid ttnn.Shape slice incompatibility

upstream_fixes: writer CT args use output tensor dimensions

description: Add Pass 2: re-read input, tilize, subtract mean using COL broadcast. Produces centered data (x - mean) at full input shape.

approach: Changed to 2 passes per tile-row: same 32 sticks read twice into c_0 for mean and subtract passes
Added Pass 2: tilize c_0->c_1, sub<COL>(c_1, c_24)->c_25, untilize c_25->c_17. Pop c_24 at end of tile-row.

change: Reverted output_shape back to full input shape
reason: Stage 3 produces full-shape output (x - mean), not reduced

upstream_fixes: reverted output_shape back to full input shape

description: Add square + reduce_row to Pass 2 to compute variance. Output is reduced shape with only column 0 valid.

approach: Added Phase 5 (square c_25->c_1) and Phase 6 (reduce SUM REDUCE_ROW c_1->c_26) after sub<COL>. Changed untilize from c_25(Wt tiles) to c_26(1 tile). Added c_26 CB alias.

change: Changed output_shape from full input shape to reduced shape: input_shape[:-1] + [32]
reason: Variance stage outputs reduced shape with only Col0 valid, test expects list(shape[:-1]) + [32]

summary: c_0: 2*Wt push/pop balanced across 2 passes. c_1: 3*Wt push/pop balanced (tilize x2 + square -> reduce x2 + sub + reduce). c_2: persistent scaler, never popped. c_24: 1 push from reduce, WaitUpfrontNoPop in sub, manual pop at end. c_25: Wt push from sub, Wt pop from square. c_26: 1 push from reduce, 1 pop from untilize. c_17: 1 push from untilize, 1 pop from writer. All balanced.

description: Add Pass 3: add epsilon+rsqrt to variance, re-read input, subtract mean, multiply by inv_std. Full layer normalization without affine parameters.

approach: Added Phase 7 (add<SCALAR> eps+rsqrt c_26->c_27), Phase 8 (tilize pass 3), Phase 9 (sub<COL> mean again c_1->c_25), Phase 10 (mul<COL> inv_std c_25->c_16). Untilize c_16->c_17. Pop c_24+c_27 at tile-row end. Added cb_wait_front(c_3,1) before loop. Added rsqrt.h include.
Changed NUM_PASSES from 2 to 3 for the normalize pass (mean+variance+normalize)

change: Reverted output_shape from reduced (input_shape[:-1]+[32]) back to full input shape
reason: Normalize stage outputs full shape (same as input), not reduced

summary: c_0: 3*Wt balanced (3 passes). c_1: 4*Wt balanced (3 tilize + 1 square push, 2 reduce + 1 sub + 1 sub pop). c_2: persistent scaler. c_3: waited before loop, NoWaitNoPop in phase 7. c_24: 1 push, WaitUpfrontNoPop+NoWaitNoPop, pop at end. c_25: 2*Wt balanced (2 sub push, 1 square + 1 mul pop). c_26: 1 push/pop (reduce+add). c_27: 1 push, WaitUpfrontNoPop, pop at end. c_16: Wt push/pop (mul+untilize). c_17: Wt push/pop (untilize+writer). All balanced.

description: Add gamma (scale) and beta (shift) affine transformation. Reader duplicates gamma/beta sticks for tilize. Compute tilizes gamma/beta once, then applies mul(gamma) and add(beta) in Pass 3.

change: Added TensorAccessorArgs for gamma (index 4) and beta (index 5) to reader CT args, with dummy 0 placeholders when not present
reason: Reader needs TensorAccessor to read gamma/beta sticks from DRAM for affine stage

approach: Added gamma/beta stick duplication at program start: if has_gamma, read gamma stick 32x into c_0 (Wt pages) via TensorAccessor<4>. Same for beta via TensorAccessor<5>. Added gamma_tensor_args and beta_tensor_args CT arg declarations.

Added c_4/c_5 CB aliases. Added gamma/beta tilize at program start (c_0->c_4, c_0->c_5). Added cb_wait_front for c_4/c_5 before loop. Added Phase 11 (mul<NONE> c_16,c_4->c_25) and Phase 12 (add<NONE> src_cb,c_5->c_16). Computed c_pre_untilize at compile time. Added program-end pop for c_4/c_5.

summary: Program start: c_0 push Wt (gamma) + Wt (beta), tilize consumes both. c_4/c_5 persistent (waited once, NoWaitNoPop in loop, popped at program end). Per tile-row: c_0 3*Wt balanced. c_1 4*Wt balanced. c_24 1 push/pop. c_25 3*Wt balanced (sub+sub+mul_gamma push, square+mul_inv_std+add_beta pop). c_26 1 push/pop. c_27 1 push+pop. c_16 2*Wt balanced (mul_inv_std+add_beta push, mul_gamma+untilize pop). c_17 Wt balanced. All balanced.
